evidence_excerpt: At 6-month follow-up, the patient had full strength in all extremities and her numbness resolved. Surprisingly, she lived a normal life without any symptoms.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: At 6-month follow-up... her numbness resolved... she lived a normal life without any symptoms.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: At 6-month follow-up, the patient had full strength in all extremities.
At 6-month follow-up... her numbness resolved and she lived a normal life without any symptoms.

notes_on_uncertainty: Follow-up data reported only up to 6 months postoperatively; no information beyond 12 months, so long-term (>12 months) outcomes are inferred from mid-term results. There is minor inconsistency about timing of planned laminoplasty (reported as 6 months vs 1 year), and it was scheduled but not documented as performed.
